A standout shoyu ramen spot in Tokyo. Their signature menu is the “Special Shoyu Ramen.” Built on a chicken-based broth blended with multiple soy sauces, the first sip brings out the richness of chicken oil, deep umami from the soy sauce, and a subtle sweetness. As you continue, the flavors finish clean and balanced. The charcoal-grilled chashu adds a gentle smoky aroma that naturally melts into the broth✨ The straight noodles hold the soup well, delivering its flavor all the way through each bite. The chashu comes in a variety of cuts, each prepared differently—from rich, fatty pieces to lighter, more delicate textures—letting you enjoy a contrast of juiciness and mouthfeel. [Ramen Sakurai 麺屋 さくら井] - Location: 2 Chome-15-27 Kamirenjaku, Mitaka, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Mon & Sat 11:30 - 15:00 / 18:00 - 20:30, Tue/Thu/Fri 11:30 - 15:00, Sun 11:30 - 16:00 (Closed Wed) - Menu: Special Shoyu Ramen (¥2,000) #ramen #tokyoramen #shoyuramen #라멘

McDonald’s Happy Meal UK Fruitizz Advert 2012 The McDonalds Fruitizz 2012 TV commercial was launched in May 2012 by advertising agency Leo Burnett to introduce a healthier, fizzy beverage option for children. Ingredients: A carbonated blend of 99% fruit juice (apple, grape, and raspberry) with no added sugar, artificial colours, or flavours. Menu Position: It was introduced as a healthy alternative to traditional sodas, counting as one of a child’s recommended five-a-day fruit portions. The Controversy: Despite escaping an advertising ban by the Advertising Standards Authority (ASA), the drink faced public backlash when parents realised a large cup contained over 49 grams (approximately 12 teaspoons) of natural sugar. #nostalgia #advert #McDonalds #McDonaldshappymeal #HappyMeal  #uktv #2012 #2010s #fruitjuice #animation

The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. Please tell me I’m not the only one doing this at 2 am 😭 Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, minced garlic, and green onions on top. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. You can use any toppings you like 🤤 Enjoy hot and creamy 🍜🔥 #buldak #buldakramen #ramen #Foodie #noodles

Ultra Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic (minced) 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil (for topping) Instructions Cook noodles until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix well until it turns thick and glossy. Add chili oil and stir. Pour in heavy cream and mix until smooth, creamy, and slightly thickened (that rich orange color 🔥). Add noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and let it melt into the sauce. Add dumplings and sausages on top. Cover and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil drizzle. . #buldak #buldakramen #eat #cook #Foodie

Chicken Tortilla Wrap 🌮 Chicken thighs marinated in paprika, dried garlic, dried onion, salt, pepper and olive oil. Leave for at least 30 minutes, then cook until golden. Add cheddar and mozzarella to the tortilla and cook on a pan from both sides until the cheese melts. Sauce: mayo, jalapeños, jalapeño juice, lime juice, paprika, dried garlic and dried onion. Slice the chicken into small pieces and add into the cheesy tortilla with the sauce 🤍 Tortilla con Pollo 🌮 Muslos de pollo marinados con pimentón, ajo seco, cebolla seca, sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva. Dejar marinar mínimo 30 minutos y cocinar hasta dorar. Agregar cheddar y mozzarella a la tortilla y cocinar en la sartén por ambos lados hasta que el queso se derrita. Salsa: mayonesa, jalapeños, jugo de jalapeños, jugo de lima, pimentón, ajo seco y cebolla seca. Raising Cane’s-Style Chicken Fingers With Cane’s Sauce. Ingredients: For the Chicken: - 2 lb chicken breast, cut into strips - Oil for frying For the Wet Batter: - 2 cups buttermilk - 2 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tbsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp smoked paprika For the Dry Batter: - 2 cups all-purpose flour - 3 tbsp cornstarch - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - 1 tsp smoked paprika For the Cane’s Sauce: - 1 cup mayonnaise - 4 tbsp ketchup - 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tsp smoked paprika Instructions: 1. Prepare the wet batter by whisking together buttermilk, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. Add the chicken strips to the wet batter and marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight. 2. Prepare the dry batter by whisking together flour, cornstarch, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and smoked paprika. 3. Remove the chicken from the wet batter, allowing excess to drip off, then coat each strip in the dry batter. 4. Deep-fry the coated chicken strips in hot oil (about 350°F) until golden brown and cooked through, approximately 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through. 5. Prepare the Cane’s Sauce by whisking together mayonnaise, ketchup,Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. 6. Serve the crispy chicken fingers with Cane’s Sauce. #canessauce #raisingcanes #friedchicken #chickentenders #Recipe
